description_long: This shotgun features a robust, industrial design with a combination of matte black metal and polished wood elements. The receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from dark metal, with visible mechanical details such as screws, levers, and a prominent sighting mechanism on top. The stock and foregrip are made of wood, displaying a rich brown color and a smooth, slightly glossy finish. The shotgun has a lever-action mechanism, with a large, curved lever loop beneath the receiver for cycling the action. The trigger guard is rounded and substantial, providing ample space for gloved fingers. Overall, the weapon exudes a rugged, utilitarian aesthetic suitable for urban environments.
description: A rugged lever-action shotgun with a black metal receiver and barrel, complemented by a polished wooden stock and foregrip. It features a prominent lever loop and a rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, metal receiver, and lever-action mechanism.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the barrel opening, sight, and the rounded end of the wooden stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same key features as view 0, with additional detail on the receiver and lever.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, standard barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
